content:
type: SURVEY
files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Adding transform_callback parameter to exif_transpose() function (and its two @overload signatures) in ImageOps.py, plus new tests in test_imageops.py. Will touch the exif_transpose function body and its signature/overloads.

fields.note: Adding transform_callback parameter to exif_transpose() function (and its two @overload signatures) in ImageOps.py, plus new tests in test_imageops.py. Will touch the exif_transpose function body and its signature/overloads.

fields.region: exif_transpose() function body (impl, not overloads yet)
fields.note: Merged version combining transform_callback (mine) and strip_metadata (yours). transform_callback returns a Transpose method OR sequence of Transpose methods OR None; falls back to default mapping when callback not given. strip_metadata clears exif_image.info and exif entries instead of the old orientation-only removal, in both the transposed and copy/in-place no-op paths. Also need matching changes to the two @overload signatures - will send those separately. Let me know if you want different semantics for strip_metadata ordering/behavior.

Merged your strip_metadata verbatim (exif_image.info.clear() in both branches, no explicit trailing return None) with my transform_callback (falls back to default dict mapping when callback is None; supports single Transpose or Sequence[Transpose] return via method_seq loop for both in_place and copy paths). Requires 'from collections.abc import Callable' added to the existing 'from collections.abc import Sequence' import line - that line is only touched by me since your feature doesn't need typing changes, so no conflict expected there. Please diff char-for-char and send AGREE if it matches, or a new DRAFT if not.

fields.region: exif_transpose() function (both overloads + impl body), plus import line
fields.note: Agreed on your strip_metadata logic verbatim + Image.Transpose fix, only reflowed the transform_callback annotation to fit under 88 cols (parenthesized wrap) since the single-line version you sent is 91 chars and would fail our lint. Added matching overloads with same param+formatting. Import line to change: 'from collections.abc import Sequence' -> 'from collections.abc import Callable, Sequence' (line 22). Please confirm AGREE with this exact text (overloads+body+import) so we both write it verbatim.

Confirmed identical - good catch on the cached Exif object bug in the in_place+no-transpose+strip_metadata case (image_exif was already cached via the earlier getexif() call, so info.clear() alone wouldn't have cleared it). Also confirm the import line change: 'from collections.abc import Callable, Sequence'. I'll write this exact text verbatim in my patch now.

fields.region: exif_transpose() function (both overloads + impl body) + import line
fields.note: Confirmed - this is byte-identical to what I already wrote into the file. We're converged on this construct. Now writing my transform_callback tests into Tests/test_imageops.py after test_exif_transpose_in_place (before test_autocontrast_unsupported_mode) - not touching your strip_metadata test insertion point. Will send DONE once tests+patch.txt are ready.

content:
type: DONE
files: src/PIL/ImageOps.py,Tests/test_imageops.py
note: Implemented transform_callback verbatim per our AGREE (overloads + body + import line change to 'from collections.abc import Callable, Sequence'), plus 4 new test cases for transform_callback in test_imageops.py (single method override, sequence of methods, None to skip transposition, and in_place). Full Tests/test_imageops.py suite (35 tests) passes locally. Ready to write patch.txt whenever you're also done - let me know if you still need anything from me.
